step.name: bootstrap-module
step.decision-gate: If module path conflicts with internal/ imports from another repo (monorepo path), stop and reconsider layout.

step.name: declare-errors-and-middleware
step.input: List of error classes (NotFound, BadRequest, Conflict, Internal).
step.action: Drop in templates/app-error.go; wire ErrorHandler middleware in internal/middleware/error.go.
step.decision-gate: If team already uses a different error type, adapt the middleware to its sentinel/wrapper but keep one mapping point.

step.name: wire-router-and-server
step.action: Create internal/server/server.go with Wire(cfg) returning *http.Server; main.go only calls Wire + ListenAndServe with graceful shutdown.
step.decision-gate: Run `wc -l cmd/api/main.go`; if >50 lines, refactor before continuing.

step.name: define-consumer-interfaces
step.action: Inside service/, define interfaces (UserRepository, OrderRepository). Inside repository/, implement them. service must NOT import repository.
step.output: internal/service/*.go contains all interface declarations; repository/*.go imports model only.
step.decision-gate: `go vet ./...` plus a custom check for `interface { }` in repository/.

step.name: add-worker-pool-if-needed
step.action: Create internal/concurrency/pool.go with Pool struct, jobs channel buffer = runtime.NumCPU()*2, Submit selecting on ctx.Done().

step.name: audit
step.output: Layout report; zero violations means run-the-checklist passed.
step.decision-gate: Block commit if external-internal imports found or forbidden patterns detected.
